src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security configuration from deprecated method-chaining API to the new lambda-based DSL required in Spring Security 6+.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.why_exists: The method-chaining API (e.g., .csrf().disable(), .authorizeHttpRequests() without lambda) is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.
